---
title: "Quarto 1"
author: "Harsh Tripathi"
format: html

---


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

penguins %>%
  drop_na(species, bill_length_mm, bill_depth_mm, flipper_length_mm) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = bill_length_mm,
    y = bill_depth_mm,
    color = species,
    size = flipper_length_mm
  )) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7, color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +
  labs(
    title = "Penguin Bill Dimensions by Species",
    subtitle = "Larger flipper length tends to coincide with longer bills",
    x = "Bill length (mm)",
    y = "Bill depth (mm)",
    color = "Species",
    size = "Flipper length (mm)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey35"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
